Twitter

Minburu

Minburu is one of my apps. It's an editor for writing notes that has bi-directional link support and spaced repetition to help you develop and find connections between your ideas

If you enjoy my writing, share it with a friend or on social media where the Blessed Zuckerberg will rain the life-affirming currency of likes down upon me!
